WPUSI019011.label: Copper PPI
WPUSI019011.mechanism: Copper is the primary conductor for transformer windings; its input price feeds directly into finished transformer cost.

WPU102501.label: Aluminum mill shapes PPI
WPU102501.mechanism: Aluminum is the main alternative winding conductor and is used in housings and radiators.

WPU101.label: Iron & steel PPI
WPU101.mechanism: Electrical (silicon) steel forms the transformer core; broad iron & steel prices proxy that core-metal cost.

WPU1012.label: Iron & steel scrap PPI
WPU1012.mechanism: Scrap is the feedstock for electric-arc steelmaking; it sits upstream of finished steel and may lead it.

PCOPPUSDM.label: Global copper price
PCOPPUSDM.mechanism: Independent global (LME-based) copper benchmark; triangulates the domestic copper PPI.

PALUMUSDM.label: Global aluminum price
PALUMUSDM.mechanism: Independent global aluminum benchmark; triangulates the domestic aluminum PPI.

PNICKUSDM.label: Global nickel price
PNICKUSDM.mechanism: Nickel alloys electrical steels and stainless components; a global proxy for alloying-input cost.

WTISPLC.label: WTI crude oil
WTISPLC.mechanism: Energy is a major cost in smelting, rolling and transformer fabrication; crude oil proxies broad energy cost.

WPU117.label: Electrical machinery & equip. PPI
WPU117.mechanism: Broad electrical-goods price level; a sibling output market that may co-move with transformers.

IPUTIL.label: Industrial production: utilities
IPUTIL.mechanism: Utility output proxies grid-side demand; stronger grid activity can pull transformer demand and price.

MANEMP.label: Manufacturing employment
MANEMP.mechanism: General manufacturing labour demand; included as a negative-control anchor (weak expected link, per the brief).

WPU101707.label: Cold-rolled steel sheet (GOES proxy)
WPU101707.mechanism: Grain-oriented electrical steel — the transformer CORE material — is a specialised cold-rolled silicon-steel sheet. FRED has no GOES-specific series, so cold-rolled steel sheet & strip is the closest public PPI to the core input. Mechanistically the strongest single candidate.

WPU1026.label: Nonferrous wire & cable PPI
WPU1026.mechanism: The literal wound-conductor product (copper/aluminum wire & cable) that goes into windings — one step downstream of raw metal, one step upstream of the finished transformer.

WPU1011.label: Iron ores PPI
WPU1011.mechanism: Deepest upstream input to the steel core (ore -> steel -> electrical steel); may lead finished steel, and thus transformers, at the longest horizon.

WPU0576.label: Finished lubricants PPI
WPU0576.mechanism: Proxy for transformer insulating/mineral oil, a genuine dielectric-coolant input to oil-filled transformers; refined-oil cost distinct from crude.

PZINCUSDM.label: Global zinc price
PZINCUSDM.mechanism: Zinc galvanises steel transformer tanks, enclosures and structural steel; also a core member of the base-metals price cycle that feeds equipment cost.

PLEADUSDM.label: Global lead price
PLEADUSDM.mechanism: Lead is used in cable sheathing, some electrical components and counterweights, and triangulates the broad non-ferrous base-metals cycle.

PTINUSDM.label: Global tin price
PTINUSDM.mechanism: Tin is the solder that joins electrical connections in transformers, switchgear and assemblies; its price tracks connection/joint material cost.

WPU1017.label: Steel mill products PPI
WPU1017.mechanism: Broad finished steel (sheet, plate, structural) fabricated into transformer tanks, cores and mountings — one step downstream of raw iron & steel.

WPU101705.label: Steel wire PPI
WPU101705.mechanism: Steel wire is used for core banding, tie/support wire and structural bracing inside coils and assemblies.

WPU057.label: Refined petroleum products PPI
WPU057.mechanism: Transformer insulating/mineral oil is a refined-petroleum product; this also proxies broad energy and fabrication cost feeding equipment prices.

WPU072.label: Plastic products PPI
WPU072.mechanism: Plastics form insulation, bushings, coil formers and enclosures in transformers and switchgear; a genuine non-metal input.

WPU0531.label: Natural gas PPI
WPU0531.mechanism: Natural gas is a major energy input to metal smelting, rolling and component fabrication (and to grid gas generation); an upstream cost driver.

WPU054.label: Electric power PPI
WPU054.mechanism: Electricity is a dominant cost in aluminium and steel production and in fabrication; grid electricity price proxies that energy input.

IPMAN.label: Industrial production: manufacturing
IPMAN.mechanism: Broad manufacturing output cycle; rising activity pulls electrical-equipment orders and tightens input-material demand ahead of price moves.
